title: A water dispenser
abstract: The invention relates to a water dispenser (1 ) comprising a body (2), a feeding region (3) provided on the body (2), enabling clean water to be delivered on the body (2), a pump (4) enabling conveying water (S) from the feeding region (3), and at least one heat changer (5) enabling the conveyed water to reach the temperature requested by the user, by changing its temperature.
claims: Claims ( 8 ) A water dispenser (1) comprising a body (2), a feeding region (3) provided on the body (2), enabling clean water to be delivered on the body (2), a pump (4) enabling conveying water (S) from the feeding region (3), and at least one heat changer (5) enabling the conveyed water to reach the temperature requested by the user, by changing its temperature,Â characterized by a cartridge (7) provided on the body (2), in which a plurality of various flavors are disposed, and by a mixing chamber (6) enabling the clean water delivered from the feeding region (3) and the flavors delivered from the cartridge (7) to be combined and mixed homogeneously. A water dispenser (1) according to claim 1, characterized by a flavor channel (8) whose one end is disposed on the cartridge (7) and the other end is disposed on the mixing chamber (6), enabling the flavor to be conveyed to the mixing chamber (6). A water dispenser (1) according to any one of the claims 1 or 2, characterized by a control unit (9) enabling conveying to the mixing chamber (6), water in an amount determined by the user and flavor in an amount adequate to the amount of water, predefined on the control unit by the producer for achieving the flavor level determined by the user. A water dispenser (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by the control unit (9) enabling achieving the desired flavor level by homogeneously mixing water in the selected temperature with the amount of flavor predefined on the control unit by the producer according to the water temperature and the flavor level determined by the user. A water dispenser (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by a mixer (12) provided on the mixing chamber (6) so as to be vertical to the base of the mixing chamber (6), comprising a plurality of flaps (11) on a vertical extension (10), and enabling the flavor and the water to be mixed homogeneously by means of the flaps (11) by rotation of the extension (10) about its own axis. A water dispenser (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by a weight sensor (13) provided on the base of the mixing chamber (6), enabling determining the weight value of the water amount determined by the user, corresponding to the water amount pre-saved to the control unit (9) by the producer. A water dispenser (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by a control panel (15) comprising a plurality of buttons (14) enabling the user to determine the water temperature, the water amount and the flavor amount. A water dispenser (1) according to any one of the preceding claims, characterized by a plurality of illumination means (16) provided on the control panel (15), enabling the user to perceive the amount of flavor remaining on the cartridge (7), selected volume of water, flavor level and the water temperature.
